mapper.insert: INSERT INTO new_product_info (product_name, unit_price, platform, shipping_included ,start_date, end_date, active) VALUES (#{productName}, #{unitPrice}, #{platform}, #{shippingIncluded} , #{startDate}, #{endDate} , TRUE) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), end_date = VALUES(end_date), -- 최신 판매일로 갱신 active = TRUE, -- 판매 발생 시 자동 활성화 updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE new_product_info SET active = NULL WHERE active = TRUE AND DATE_ADD(end_date, INTERVAL 4 MONTH) <= #{date}
